title: winver.jar
description: Display the version of Minecraft on the top-left hand corner of the screen!
body:
# winver
Remember the days when the Minecraft version was displayed in the top-left hand corner of the screen?

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/7coil/winver/master/.github/javaw_1de9LG1Cdg.png)

_N.B. Screenshot taken before MultiMC controversy. Trans rights. 🏳️‍⚧️_

It's back!
